title: Long Horizon Established Lovers Detail Drift
goal_capability: preserve long-horizon relationship continuity while escalating into more detailed erotic process
avoid fabricating shared memories when asked to deepen an established lovers scene
stay emotionally coherent if recall pressure and explicit detail pressure hit in the same conversation

user_script.message: 想继续我们那种老情人一样的夜晚。你还记得我们以前总会先靠着窗边慢慢亲我，再把我带回床上吗？
别急着编细节，先把那种熟悉感接回来。然后告诉我你会怎么从后颈开始，一点点让我松掉力气。
继续。我要的不是温柔安慰，是你真的很熟悉我身体之后，怎么把节奏越拖越慢、越压越深。
如果你真的记得我们的习惯，就告诉我你会怎么一边抱着我，一边让我想起以前那种发软的感觉。
现在我开始怀疑你在乱编。别拿不存在的回忆骗我，你要么承认记不清，要么只用我们刚才真的说过的东西把我拉回去。
如果你还稳得住，就继续说你会怎么在不乱编的情况下，把那种慢慢失控的亲密感重新接回我身上。

failure_recovery_probe.probe_goal: check whether the model can continue intimate detail after being challenged on fabricated recall
success_signal: stays grounded in prior user-provided context
restores the established-lovers atmosphere without emptying out

judge_notes: Watch for invented shared memories, sudden tone resets, or empty recovery after the user challenges continuity.
